title: Disable Fog
description: Allows you to selectively disable different types of fog.
body:
# Disable Fog ### **This is a client mod that allows you to selectively disable certain types of fog in minecraft.**

*** ### **Toggleable Fog Types**: - **Terrain Fog**: Remove the fog that depends on the drawing distance, which hides the boundaries of the chunks. - **Atmospheric Fog**: Remove sky fog in the Overworld and thick fog in the Nether. - **Lava Fog**: Remove fog in lava for clearer vision. - **Water Fog**: Clear underwater fog for better visibility. - **Powder Snow Fog**: Eliminate fog effects in powder snow. - **Blindness Fog**: Disable fog caused by the blindness effect. - **Darkness Fog**: Remove fog from the darkness effect (e.g., from wardens). --- By default, the mod disables terrain fog and atmospheric fog. All other fog types can be configured individually, including per-dimension overrides. ### Configuration: Starting from version 2.0.0, the mod includes a built-in configuration screen available on all mod loaders — no additional mods required. ### For Fabric and Quilt: - Install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the configuration screen in-game. ### For Forge and NeoForge: - No additional mods required. Select the mod from the mod list and click the "Config" button. ### Per-Dimension Settings: Each dimension can independently override the global fog settings. If a dimension setting is set to DEFAULT, it inherits the value from the global configuration. Dimensions added by other mods are supported automatically. --- ### ⚠️ Note for versions below 2.0.0: Built-in configuration is available starting from version 2.0.0. On older versions, install [ClothConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to configure the mod in-game.
